svg.title: HireGraph multi-agent architecture
svg.desc: LangGraph pipeline from inputs through supervisor to six specialized agents, ending in outputs

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How are resumes uploaded in HireGraph?')
sendPrompt('What does the Supervisor agent do in HireGraph?')
sendPrompt('Explain the JD Parser agent in detail')
sendPrompt('How does parallel resume screening work in HireGraph?')
sendPrompt('How does the Ranker agent score candidates?')
sendPrompt('What does the Bias Checker agent look for?')
sendPrompt('How does the Outreach Drafter agent work?')
sendPrompt('What is in the HireGraphState object?')
sendPrompt('How is LangSmith used in HireGraph?')
sendPrompt('What does the ranked candidate list look like?')
sendPrompt('What does the bias audit report include?')
sendPrompt('What do the outreach email drafts look like?')
